name: Zhonglu.Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhonglu.Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells bicycles in the People's Republic of China. It offers bicycles and electric bicycles under the Forever brand; wheelchairs; and bowling equipment; natural latex products; plastic paving materials; and automatic chess and card equipment, as well as public bicycle rental service systems. The company also exports its products to Europe, Asia, and Africa. Zhonglu.Co.,Ltd was founded in 1940 and is based in Shanghai, China.
